name: BMC Wellness Center
description: Come play pickleball at BMC Wellness Center in Centreville, AL! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms, locker rooms, and water.
open_play_schedule:
Court Availability
View scheduled closures and additional Saturday availability on our calendar. Pickleball court times past 2:00pm on Saturdays will also be added here. Reservations are not available online, so please call or visit the front desk to book during these hours.
Walk-ins are always welcome. Make sure to check before you come out so you’re ready to play
